name: I need this done fast. What is the minimum viable FAQ schema setup for AEO?
description: Publish a small set of accurate, high-value FAQs first, then expand them later based on data.

mainEntity.name: I need this done fast. What is the minimum viable FAQ schema setup for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are short on time, publish the most important FAQs first and keep them simple. It is better to launch a small, accurate section than to delay for a perfect but unfinished one. Later, you can expand based on search data and customer questions.
acceptedAnswer.description: Publish a small set of accurate, high-value FAQs first, then expand them later based on data.
